title: Renamable Mace's
description: This Pack Adds The Ability To Change The Visual Of The Mace.
body:
**This Pack Adds The Ability To Change The Visual Of The Mace.**

These Are The Custom Names And Visuals.

(Scythe)

![Scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c982fee29125f72663091ca03ea7a636e38dcc77.png)

(Meat Mallet)

![Meat Mallet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c89eddefa1c468fa5c30d6a6286d75edb966f9a5.png)

If You Like These There Will Be More In The Future, So Follow The Project So You Dont Miss Out.
